title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 0–3, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Are willing to fight with me?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Because the enemies out- number you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You have the words "I'm scared" written all over your face

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: idiots! Me? scared? So what if they out- number me!? They can't compete with me!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: I'm Captain usopp! In my veins flows the blood of a courageous warrior!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you guys looking at!? They're Captain Kuro's Fleet! Of course I'm scared!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I dont need your sympathy! Go away! Now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're not Sym- Pathizing for you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But rather we're commending you for having courage

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Why else would we risk our own lives?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
